title: Clean Ice
description: Cleans up the ice textures to be much simpler, especially built with ice boat racing in mind.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e21a7470c440f6e68acf273dcd9d141f5b6a01cf.png)
![Removes most of the noise and shine from the ice texture to make it look cleaner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69a3a06033d16e14c2616f7ec066bab9f29274fe.png)
![Ice Boat Track Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bc15576d78140f5067f3f500f347e0bf3db2cfc_0.webp)
![Made with ice boat racing in mind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae1df9b803e48a06548f70a013b4652f3029e258.png)
![Ice Spike](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b145217bd7eac032aecd056f47aaed523b6a910_0.webp)
![Looks great in normal worlds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06b9b63d81f6af2c2c16b881b833f6a4abd8e4f6.png)
![All the ices](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6aa8e7eaf066c64d61a4b5426a0544f041f34530_0.webp)

PVP, Simple, Ice boat racing
